seoTitle: Cable Beach vs Caiguna — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cable Beach and Caiguna. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cable Beach vs Caiguna: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cable Beach and Caiguna.
heading: Cable Beach vs Caiguna — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cable Beach, Western Australia and Caiguna, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cable Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Caiguna (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cable Beach or Caiguna safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cable Beach has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Caiguna scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cable Beach scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Caiguna scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cable Beach or Caiguna?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cable Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
